--- a/configmap.yaml
+++ b/configmap.yaml
data[app.properties]  (v1/ConfigMap/myapp-config)
  ± value change in multiline text (two inserts, two deletions)
    - environment=production
    - log_level=info
    + environment=staging
    + log_level=debug
      max_connections=100
      

data[debug.mode]  (v1/ConfigMap/myapp-config)
  ± whitespace only change
    - true·
    + true

data.verbose  (v1/ConfigMap/myapp-config)
  ± type change from string to bool
    - false
    + false

--- a/deployment.yaml
+++ b/deployment.yaml
metadata.labels  (apps/v1/Deployment/myapp)
  + two map entries added:
    environment: production
    team: backend

metadata.labels.version  (apps/v1/Deployment/myapp)
  ± type change from int to string
    - 2
    + 2.0

spec.replicas  (apps/v1/Deployment/myapp)
  ± value change
    - 1
    + 3

spec.containers  (apps/v1/Deployment/myapp)
  + two list entries added:
    - name: sidecar
      image: envoy
    - name: monitor
      image: prometheus

spec.containers.app.image  (apps/v1/Deployment/myapp)
  ± value change
    - nginx
    + nginx:latest

--- a/ingress.yaml
+++ /dev/null
(document)  (networking.k8s.io/v1/Ingress/myapp-ingress)
  - one document removed:
    ---
    apiVersion: networking.k8s.io/v1
    kind: Ingress
    metadata:
      name: myapp-ingress
    spec:
      defaultBackend:
        service:
          name: myapp
          port:
            number: 80

--- /dev/null
+++ b/secret.yaml
(document)  (v1/Secret/myapp-secret)
  + one document added:
    ---
    apiVersion: v1
    kind: Secret
    metadata:
      name: myapp-secret
    type: Opaque
    data:
      token: YWJjMTIz

--- a/service.yaml
+++ b/service.yaml
metadata.labels  (v1/Service/myapp)
  - two map entries removed:
    tier: frontend
    version: 1

spec.port  (v1/Service/myapp)
  ± value change
    - 80
    + 443

spec.tags  (v1/Service/myapp)
  - two list entries removed:
    - name: production
    - name: canary
